title: Projects
text:
Below are some of the projects and areas I am currently interested in.


This project focuses on developing an open-source Python package for computing Multivariate Process Capability Indices. The goal is to provide a modular and reliable implementation for researchers and practitioners working on multivariate quality control problems.



This senior design project investigates how analytics, stochastic modeling, and optimization can be combined to support personalized leadership development through data-driven recommendations.

title: About Me
text:
I am Sena Sivrikaya, a senior Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University in Ankara, Türkiye.
My academic interests focus on data analytics, optimization, operations research, and decision-making under uncertainty. I am especially interested in how analytical methods can be used to understand, model, and improve complex systems.

title: A Healthy and Practical Breakfast Idea
text:
A simple breakfast can still be both healthy and satisfying.
One practical option is to cook finely ground oats with lactose-free milk and then top it with:

strawberries
blackberries
small pieces of 80% dark chocolate



This breakfast can be a nice balance of:

carbohydrates from oats
fruit for freshness and natural sweetness
a richer taste from dark chocolate

It is also easy to prepare and works well for busy mornings.



I like this kind of breakfast because it is both quick and comforting. It feels more nourishing than many packaged snacks, while still being practical enough for a student or intern schedule.

title: Graduate School Exams and Common Master’s Fields for Industrial Engineers
text:
Students who apply for graduate school, especially abroad, may need to take standardized exams such as:

IELTS
GRE
GMAT





IELTS measures English language proficiency, especially for academic and international study environments.



GRE is a general graduate admissions exam that may be required by many master’s and PhD programs.



GMAT is commonly associated with business-related graduate programs, especially management and MBA-style programs.




Industrial Engineering graduates often continue in fields such as:

Industrial Engineering
Engineering Management
Systems Engineering

These areas are popular because they build naturally on the analytical, optimization, and systems-thinking background of industrial engineering.



Industrial engineers are trained to understand systems, improve processes, and support decision-making. Because of this, they often fit well into graduate programs that combine:

analytics
operations
management
systems thinking

title: Assignment 1
text: My first assignment has two parts.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Open-Ended Question
Question
Cem Vardar mentions that simple solutions are often preferred over complex ones. Why does he advocate an evolutionary approach instead of designing a perfect system from scratch?
Answer
Complex systems are influenced by many interacting factors such as human behavior, operational constraints, and organizational culture. Designing a perfect system from scratch often relies on unrealistic assumptions. An evolutionary approach allows engineers to gradually improve the system while observing how each change affects performance.

title: Assignment 1
text:
Multiple Choice Question
Question
According to Cem Vardar, which technical tool has remained a constant must-have throughout his career?

Deep Learning Frameworks

SQL

Natural Language Processing

Discrete Event Simulation

Correct Answer: B) SQL

title: What Do IoT, Digital Twins, Federated Learning, and Agentic AI Mean?
text:
Many technology topics are becoming more common in engineering and data-driven industries. Here is a short explanation of a few important ones.


IoT (Internet of Things) refers to physical devices connected to the internet so that they can collect, send, and receive data.
Examples: - smart watches - factory sensors - connected home devices



A digital twin is a digital representation of a real-world object, process, or system.
It can be used to: - monitor performance - simulate changes - predict future behavior



Federated learning is a machine learning approach where models are trained across multiple devices or institutions without directly sharing raw data.
This is important in areas where privacy matters, such as: - healthcare - finance - mobile applications



Agentic AI refers to AI systems that can act more independently by planning steps, making decisions, and carrying out tasks toward a goal.
Instead of only answering one prompt at a time, these systems can behave more like agents that: - reason through tasks - choose actions - interact with tools or information sources



These concepts are important because they show how engineering, data, and intelligent systems are becoming more connected in modern applications.

title: Reformer Pilates vs. Mat Pilates
text:
Pilates can be practiced in different forms, and two of the most common ones are reformer pilates and mat pilates.


Reformer pilates is performed on a specialized machine called a reformer. This machine uses springs, straps, and a sliding carriage to create resistance and support.



Provides adjustable resistance
Can support posture and alignment
Allows a wider variety of movements
Often feels more guided for beginners





Mat pilates is performed on the floor using a mat. It mainly relies on body weight, balance, and core control.



Does not require large equipment
Focuses strongly on body awareness and control
Can be practiced more easily at home
Usually more accessible and affordable





Neither one is universally better. The best option depends on your goals.

If you want guided resistance and equipment-based exercises, reformer pilates may be more suitable.
If you want a simpler and more accessible routine, mat pilates can be a great choice.

Both forms can improve posture, flexibility, balance, and core strength.
